instructions.instruction: Use this skill before writing ANY GenServer, Supervisor, Task, or Agent module.
instructions.original_snippets: Use this skill before writing ANY GenServer, Supervisor, Task, or Agent module.
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger otp-essentials.

instructions.instruction: **Always use `@impl true`** before GenServer/Agent callbacks (init, handle_call, handle_cast, handle_info, terminate)
instructions.original_snippets: **Always use `@impl true`** before GenServer/Agent callbacks (init, handle_call, handle_cast, handle_info, terminate)
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger otp-essentials.

instructions.instruction: **Use `GenServer.call` for request/response, `GenServer.cast` for fire-and-forget** — never cast when you need a result
instructions.original_snippets: **Use `GenServer.call` for request/response, `GenServer.cast` for fire-and-forget** — never cast when you need a result
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger otp-essentials.

instructions.instruction: **Always define a public API wrapping GenServer calls** — callers should never use `GenServer.call(pid, ...)` directly
instructions.original_snippets: **Always define a public API wrapping GenServer calls** — callers should never use `GenServer.call(pid, ...)` directly
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger otp-essentials.

instructions.instruction: **Use `Task.async`/`Task.await` with bounded timeouts** — never `Task.async` without a corresponding `Task.await` or `Task.yield`
instructions.original_snippets: **Use `Task.async`/`Task.await` with bounded timeouts** — never `Task.async` without a corresponding `Task.await` or `Task.yield`
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger otp-essentials.
When a user asks for planning work that should trigger otp-essentials.

instructions.instruction: **Prefer ETS over a bottleneck GenServer** for shared read-heavy state — one GenServer serializes all access
instructions.original_snippets: **Prefer ETS over a bottleneck GenServer** for shared read-heavy state — one GenServer serializes all access
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger otp-essentials.

instructions.instruction: Always wrap GenServer calls behind a public module API. Callers should not know they're talking to a GenServer.
instructions.original_snippets: Always wrap GenServer calls behind a public module API. Callers should not know they're talking to a GenServer.
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger otp-essentials.

instructions.instruction: Never block in `init/1`. Use `handle_continue` for expensive setup.
instructions.original_snippets: Never block in `init/1`. Use `handle_continue` for expensive setup.
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger otp-essentials.

instructions.instruction: **Define children** — list in dependency order (dependencies first)
instructions.original_snippets: **Define children** — list in dependency order (dependencies first)
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger otp-essentials.

instructions.instruction: **Verify startup** — run `mix run --no-halt` or `iex -S mix` and confirm no crashes
instructions.original_snippets: **Verify startup** — run `mix run --no-halt` or `iex -S mix` and confirm no crashes
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger otp-essentials.

instructions.instruction: **Check child counts** — `Supervisor.count_children(MyApp.Supervisor)` confirms expected active/specs counts
instructions.original_snippets: **Check child counts** — `Supervisor.count_children(MyApp.Supervisor)` confirms expected active/specs counts
